description: The simple design and durable construction of these puma Benecio ankle shoes in leather are typical of the brands minimalistic designs. The leather upper provides instant style and durability, cushioned midsoles give comfort and stability and rubber outsoles guarantee maximum traction. Perfect for urban life. Upper Crinkled-leather upper for durability, style and comfort Padded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and snug Fit Leather formstripe detail on the sides High ankle support for comfort to the lower leg Branding embossed on the heel guard and ankle for style Midsole Breathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort. TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioning Outsole Textured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and grip Brand name grooves for maximum grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shine Do not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
